arts.ttl: Preview: AFC Wimbledon vs. Chesterfield - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's League Two clash between AFC Wimbledon and Chesterfield, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Wimbledon's 1-1 draw with Doncaster at the weekend was their second game without defeat, they have lost just one of their last six games. Chesterfield's 3-0 win over Fleetwood last Saturday was sixth...
